Week #18 - December 15th-December 22nd

December 15, 2025 <<<<<<< HEAD
=======
>>>>>>> 7976bd6f45e7d2662787d798323f8c70531eb58c

Another milestone this week: my BPA team advanced to the state competition! It’s rewarding to see our dedication recognized, and I’m excited to represent our region at the next level. The experience continues to sharpen my teamwork and leadership skills.

In collaboration with the Enterprise Neurosystem, I’ve started implementing sensors for our projects. It’s gratifying to see the research I’ve been doing for ISM translate into real‑world applications, and I’m learning a lot from the process of integrating and calibrating these devices.

I’ve also been applying to several summer programs, each offering unique opportunities for research and exploration in electrical engineering and environmental science. Seeing friends and classmates begin to receive college decisions has made me reflect on my own path; while my journey still has a way to go, I’m motivated by their success to continue building momentum in my projects and applications.
